data.title: Himax Q4 Earnings: Beats Estimates, Automotive And AI Tech Drive Revenue, Raises Outlook
data.description: Himax Technologies, Inc (NASDAQ: HIMX) reported Q4 revenue of $237.22 million, beating analyst estimates of $221.09 million. EPS was $0.14, higher than the estimated $0.10. Q1 guidance expects revenue growth of flat to 4.6% and EPADS of $0.09-$0.11. The stock price rose 8.21% premarket.

data.title: Reddit Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Strong Earnings
Brewing Company Molson Coors Q4 Gets Boost From Higher Pricing, Stock Rises
data.description: Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE: TAP) saw a 2% sales decline in Q4 FY24 to $2.73 billion, but exceeded expectations. Despite unfavorable foreign currency impacts, net sales from EMEA & APAC grew slightly, while adjusted EPS of $1.30 beat estimates.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Eco Wave Power Signs MoU With India's Bharat Petroleum To Develop Wave Energy
data.description: Eco Wave Power partners with BPCL to integrate wave energy into India's renewable energy strategy, tapping into the country's estimated 40,000 MW ocean energy potential.

data.title: Sanofi/Johnson & Johnson Partnered Vaccine Against Bacterial Sepsis Flunks Late-Stage Study
data.description: Sanofi and J&J halted a phase 3 E. coli vaccine trial due to insufficient efficacy. Sanofi's Q4 2024 IFRS EPS dropped by €0.15 following a $250M charge.
